scripts.build:fonts: mkdir -p docs/statics/css/files && cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/fraunces/files/*.woff2 docs/statics/css/files/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/instrument-sans/files/*.woff2 docs/statics/css/files/
scripts.build:css: bun run build:fonts && bun tailwindcss -i config/config.css --minify -o docs/statics/css/bundle.css && bun run config/hash-css.ts
scripts.build: bun run build:css && bun run build:js && bun run version-statics
scripts.dev:css: bun run build:fonts && bun tailwindcss -w -i config/config.css -o docs/statics/css/bundle.css
scripts.dev: concurrently 'bun run dev:css' 'bun run dev:js' 'bun run serve'
